examples: Serve in a separate empty pre-warmed snifter containing a clove-studded orange peel.
Stir Baileys and Advocaat and strain into snifter (NO ICE). Pour lime into middle of mixture. Swirl glass until you get a cement mix.
Eventually I quit lessons, but had developed chops enough to work in both piano bars (an underage piano man, traveling with my own snifter) and community theater orchestra pits.
When I got to my hotel, I must have looked distraught because the duty clerk offered me a snifter of Calvados and a fluffy towel.
